title: CRM Sync Without Copy-Paste for Healthcare
metaDescription: Stop retyping patient and referral data between systems. Ayothedoc installs live CRM sync for healthcare practices so your records stay current.
excerpt: A done-for-you Connections capability that keeps your CRM in sync with intake forms, inbox, and billing so your team stops copy-pasting patient and referral data.

sections.intro:
In a medical or health services practice, the same patient detail gets typed three or four times. Once on the intake form, again in the CRM, again in the booking system, and one more time in billing. Every retype is a chance for a wrong phone number, a missed referral, or a duplicate record. Front desk staff spend hours each week reconciling what should already match.

The Ayothedoc AI Operating System closes that gap. We install live CRM sync so new leads, referrals, intake submissions, appointment changes, and billing events flow into the CRM on their own. Your team stops copy-pasting and starts working from one current record. No new software for staff to learn, no rip and replace. We connect the tools you already run on and keep them honest.
sections.fourCFit:
This capability sits in the Connections layer of the AIOS. Connections is the plumbing that lets every other layer work from live data instead of stale exports.

  • Context: the system knows your service lines, providers, and intake rules, so synced records get tagged correctly.
  • Connections: this page. Your CRM, inbox, calendar, intake forms, and billing all read and write to one source of truth.
  • Capabilities: downstream workflows like the 60-Second Lead Engine, follow-ups, and recall reminders trigger from clean CRM data.
  • Cadence: sync runs continuously and a daily reconciliation report flags anything that did not match.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
When the install is done, you have a working sync layer with clear rules and a visible audit trail.

  • New intake form submissions create or update a CRM record within 60 seconds, with consent flags and referral source captured.
  • Appointment bookings, reschedules, and cancellations write back to the CRM contact within 2 minutes.
  • Billing events (invoice sent, paid, overdue) appear on the CRM record without staff lifting a finger.
  • Duplicate detection runs on email, phone, and date of birth, with a merge queue for borderline cases a human approves.
  • A daily exception report lists every record that failed to sync, with the reason and a one-click fix.
  • A written runbook so any staff member can see what is connected, what each rule does, and how to pause it.
sections.howWeInstall:
1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes): we map your current intake, CRM, calendar, and billing flow and show you where data is being retyped. Run the audit.
  2. Install (10 business days): we connect your systems, write the sync rules with your team, set up duplicate handling and the exception report, and run a parallel week so nothing surprises you. See plans.
  3. Operate (ongoing): we monitor sync health, fix breakages when an upstream tool changes, and ship one new automation per week so the system keeps getting more useful.
sections.expectedResults:
• Front desk and admin time on data entry and reconciliation drops by 60 to 85 percent in the first month.
  • Duplicate patient and lead records fall by 70 percent or more once the merge queue catches up.
  • Referral source data becomes reliable, so you can finally see which channels actually fill the schedule.
  • Billing follow-up cycles shorten because overdue status is visible on the CRM record the same day.
  • Standing guarantee: across your full AIOS, we recover 40 or more hours a month for your practice or we keep working free until we do.
sections.faq:
Is this compliant with how we handle protected health information?

We design the sync to respect your existing compliance posture. Data stays inside the systems you have already vetted, we use the access controls those systems provide, and we sign the agreements your practice requires before any connection is made. We do not move records to new vendors without your written approval.

Do we have to switch CRMs or intake tools?

No. The Connections layer is tool-agnostic. We work with the CRM, intake forms, calendar, and billing system you already run on. If something genuinely cannot connect, we tell you plainly and offer the simplest alternative.

What happens when one of our tools updates and breaks the sync?

That is what the Operate phase is for. We monitor sync health, get alerted to failures before your team notices, and fix the connection as part of your ongoing plan. The exception report also means nothing silently disappears in the meantime.
